description: **(M)** Rewrite `test-integration.bats` for current orchestrator architecture â€” remove all worktree/setup/research/evaluate/plan stage tests. Replace with tests for current flow: parse-issueâ†’implement (self-review)â†’quality-loopâ†’test-loopâ†’docsâ†’prâ†’pr-reviewâ†’complete. Should test: parse-issue schema, implement-task schema, test-loop flow, quality-loop flow, PR creation flow. Target: 0 failures.

**(S)** Fix `test-argument-parsing.bats` â€” replace `fail` commands with BATS-native `[ "$status" -ne 0 ]` or `[[ ... ]] || return 1` patterns. Alternatively, add bats-assert as a test dependency. Target: 0 failures.

**(S)** Fix `test-status-functions.bats` â€” remove `set_worktree_info` tests (function no longer exists), update `init_status` test to match current status.json schema (no setup/research/evaluate/plan stages). Target: 0 failures.

**(S)** Fix `test-rate-limit.bats` â€” update `detect_rate_limit` tests to match current implementation's string matching logic. 5 tests expect case-insensitive substring matching that the implementation doesn't provide. Either fix tests to match implementation, or fix implementation to match test expectations. Target: 0 failures.
**(S)** Fix `test-comment-helpers.bats` â€” ensure REPO constant is extracted by `source_orchestrator_functions()` awk filter, or mock it in test setup. Target: 0 failures.

**(S)** Fix timeout-as-success bug in `run_stage()` callers â€” when `run_stage()` returns `{"status":"error","error":"timeout"}`, callers check `.result` (null) not `.status`. In test loop: null â‰  "failed" falls through to test-validate. In PR review: null â‰  "approved" triggers fix cycle with empty feedback. Add helper `is_stage_timeout()` and handle explicitly.

**(S)** Add scope constraints to fix-tests prompt â€” change to: "Fix ONLY the specific test failures listed below. Do NOT rewrite test files, introduce new dependencies, or modify pre-existing test code. Only fix the failing assertions."

**(S)** Add scope enforcement to test-validate â€” compute explicit file list via `git diff $BASE_BRANCH...HEAD --name-only` (not `--changedSince` dependency graph). Pass to validate prompt as "ONLY validate tests for these specific files." Add: "If a test file has pre-existing quality issues NOT introduced by this PR, report 'passed' and note them separately."

**(S)** Add stage-type-based timeouts â€” replace flat `STAGE_TIMEOUT=3600` with `get_stage_timeout()`: test/docs/prâ†’600s, task-review/test-validateâ†’900s, implement/fixâ†’1800s, pr-reviewâ†’1800s.
**(S)** Add branch verification before commits â€” `verify_on_feature_branch()` checks `git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD` matches expected branch before fix stages.
